title: exartizo #1822
definition:
1) to complete, finish
    1a) to furnish perfectly
    1b) to finish, accomplish, (as it were, to render the days
        complete)
nasbUsage:

    1a) to furnish perfectly
    1b) to finish, accomplish, (as it were, to render the days
        complete)

    NASB:  to complete, to equip fully:
